name: Mar Cabrera
summary: Senior Full Stack Developer with 10+ years crafting solutions beyond mere code. I build complex systems balancing technical excellence with business impact, transforming challenges into software that empowers users while driving measurable results.

experience_summary.description: Designed carrier-agnostic adapter system unifying shipping provider APIs for seamless integration with international logistics providers. Optimized PostgreSQL schema for high-frequency tracking updates and built real-time notification architecture reducing communication delays.

Created custom domain models for DefyED health e-commerce platform and engineered caching strategies that improved mobile responsiveness. Restructured API endpoints to better align with business processes, improving development velocity for new feature implementation.

Developed comprehensive evaluation framework that improved chatbot response accuracy by 28%. Created specialized NLP testing scripts in Python identifying 40+ edge cases. Implemented response optimization techniques increasing user satisfaction by 22%.

Redesigned Frontsteps facility reservation system eliminating concurrency issues and created modular permission framework. Optimized database query patterns reducing page load times for community dashboards accessed by thousands of users.
Urban Hygiene sector software. Migrated .NET 4.6.1 to 4.8.1. WebForms with HTML5/Bootstrap, Razor views. Backend with RESTful APIs, LINQ. Scalable and maintainable solution.
Restored document/image upload system after ransomware attack. Learned PHP/Laravel from scratch. Improved system reliability by 50%, reduced technical debt by 40%.

Developed key microservices for Ationet's refactored architecture and built transaction reconciliation system improving financial accuracy. Created dynamic UI for parking management system adapting to different facility configurations without code changes.
Oracle database administration for fiber optic network. .NET tasks for data extraction to Excel and email automation. Fiber optic network mapping using Bentley Fiber.
Medical system for Spanish Hospital Argentina. Patient, Treatment, Evolution, Doctor, Shifts modules. Frontend with HTML/CSS/Bootstrap/JavaScript. Ongoing maintenance and extensions.
SEO strategies and web layouts for Jumbo, Disco, Vea brands. Designed Hotsale promotional pages. VTEX platform for e-commerce configuration.
Ransomware incident monitoring and analysis. Python scripts for data extraction. Assembly language training for malware behavior.
SQL stored procedures for dashboards in QlikView. Mashups with HTML/CSS/JavaScript for Qlik Sense. Data visualization for clients like Transener and Día.

projects.name: Modular Survey SDK & Analytics API
projects.description: Reusable React/TypeScript SDK plus a Node/Express API to serve surveys, collect answers and expose aggregated metrics. PostgreSQL for storage, strict typing and modular architecture. Dark-mode UI, star-rating, real-time validation, progress bars, health-check endpoint.

projects.name: Optimizely Mini Project
projects.description: Mini project showcasing skills with Optimizely, including feature flags, A/B testing, responsive content personalization, and event tracking using React hooks.

projects.name: AI Interview Agent
projects.description: AI-powered interview platform for investment research with avatar-based interactions, real-time recording capabilities, and automated insights generation. Features smart follow-up questions and sentiment analysis.

projects.name: Professional Matching Platform
projects.description: AI-powered platform parsing resumes, extracting profiles, tailoring job applications. User authentication, role-based access control, real-time notification system.

projects.name: Personal Portfolio
projects.description: Portfolio built with Astro and Next.js for optimal performance. Responsive layouts, includes Task Management Application with drag-and-drop functionality.

side_projects.name: E-commerce Maintenance (Resino & Ronix)
side_projects.description: Product catalog maintenance, image optimization, pricing updates, SEO optimizations.
